name: Potion of Vitality
entries: When you drink this potion, it removes any {@condition Exhaustion|XPHB} levels you have and ends the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition on you. For the next 24 hours, you regain the maximum number of {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} for any {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB|Hit Point Die} you spend.
This potion's crimson liquid regularly pulses with dull light, calling to mind a heartbeat.
